text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After being out with Vodka...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
What? You're going home already? Isn't it a little
early?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
This is when kids go home—not us. Why don't we
make one more stop before headin' back?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I know the perfect place, y'see. It'll be like going
out for a drive!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Don't get caught up in the details! Just follow me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So, without asking where we're going, I follow
Vodka...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Let's see here... I'm pretty sure we go straight...
and then turn right...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Wow! The wind feels so good! Bein' out in nature
is the best.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Right? The wind really is different than in the city.
It's not half bad!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Now, which way was it again? And were there
always this many plants around here?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Not in the slightest!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: L-leave it to me. You just enjoy lookin' at the sky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm a little bit worried, but I continue to follow
Vodka. Until...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Where are we?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: So we really are lost.
choice_data_list: Where were you trying to go?
Where were you trying to go?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
...This really cool rocky area I found when I was
wandering around here before.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I thought we would get there if we just took the
same path as last time, but...
choice_data_list: Do you want me to look it up on my phone?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: No way! That's like admitting defeat!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Aughhh! Why aren't we there yet?! Is my memory
goin' bad?!
choice_data_list: Let's just throw in the towel for today!
Time to awaken your sixth sense!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, you're too quick to give up... But you're
probably right. There's no guarantee we'll get
there if we keep goin' this way.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Damn it. Let's go back.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm seriously so sorry, Trainer! I just wasted your
time.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Really?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her I had plenty of fun just walking around
and talking with her.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I had fun...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But, I really wanted to be cool and show ya
around, y'know!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
It really is such a nice rocky area. I wanted to talk
with you there...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Aughhh, I'm so bummed! Lemme try again
sometime!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I'm holdin' you to that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka and I return to the way we came. On the
way back, we have fun losing ourselves in
conversation.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Sixth...sense?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Whoaaa! What's that?! It sounds so cool!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All right. Just leave it to me! Awaken, my sixth
sense!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Graaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! I just saw... some huge ruins nearby?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: You got it!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Graaah! GRAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Vodka's concentrating on that, I search for
nearby ruins on my map app, and find a likely
rocky place nearby. Now, all I have to do is...
choice_data_list: Thou shalt turn right in 200 meters...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Did I just hear... a voice in my head?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Holy cow! We can't stop now! Follow me, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With an excited Vodka leading the way, we
continue down the path until..

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Whoooa! We really made iiit!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
This is insane, Trainer! I seriously might've just
had a psychic awakening!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! Ahahaha! I am the Great and Powerful
Vodka, the awakened Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow Vodka's enthusiastic lead and the two of
us hang out and chat in the rocky area for a bit.
